sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99139" key="sunaleipto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναλ-ειπτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n99139.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀσυνάλειπτος</ref> </xr> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.412</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
